output.summary: EB-TTT adaptively scales per-layer gradients by SNR during single-pass TTT with embedding freeze and EMA burst on the GEPA/XSA backbone.
output.valOnlyReasoning: The EB-TTT protocol performs test-time adaptation solely on validation/test chunks, so training happens only on those validation tokens.
techniques: Per-layer gradient SNR scaling during single-pass TTT
Embedding freeze plus EMA burst before sliding-window evaluation
GEPA+XSA architecture with VE128, bigram hashing, and late QAT
